description: Letter from Yaḥyā b. ʿEli Kohen Fasi, in Qayrawān, to his brother Yosef, in Alexandria. Dating: Tishrei [= Jumādā I 444 AH] = August/September 1052 CE. Dating is based on the presumption that the subjects discussed here are the same as in T-S 13J26.9 (PGPID 5902), in which case this letter was sent a few weeks after that one. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #405.) VMR. Reused on verso for commercial accounts.
description_he: מכתב מיחיא בן אלי כהן פאסי, קיירואן, לאחיו יוסף, אלכסנדריה, אוגוסט-ספטמבר 1052, כנראה המשך לT-S 13J26.9
